CustomField.label: Service Appointment
CustomField.description: The bay-session/booking (Scheduler ServiceAppointment) this shot-tracking Golf_Session__c belongs to. Populated by FairwaySessionConsoleController.ensureCheckedInSession, called from the kiosk at check-in time. Note: Salesforce does not support a <unique> constraint on Lookup fields, so one-session-per-appointment is enforced by ensureCheckedInSession's own idempotency check plus a FOR UPDATE lock, not the platform.
